data_policy: L5, L10, and season records come from verified player game logs. Opponent rank prefers position-adjusted average allowed per opposing player-game; overall stat rank is retained when position samples are insufficient.

opponent_rank_methodology.limitations: Not position-adjusted and not pace-adjusted; descriptive matchup context only.

position_rank_methodology.limitations: Not pace adjusted; hybrid positions are assigned to one broad group.
